steps.title: Use the area formula
steps.content: The area of a triangle is half the product of its base and height. Here, the base is $8$ inches and the height is $11$ inches.

steps.title: Substitute the dimensions
steps.content: Substitute $b=8$ and $h=11$ into the triangle area formula: $$A=\frac{1}{2}bh=\frac{1}{2}(8)(11)$$

steps.title: Evaluate the product
steps.content: Half of $8$ is $4$, so the area is $$A=4(11)=44$$ The triangle's area is $44$ square inches. The answer is B.
